description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a landscaped plot, surrounded by mature trees and bordered by paved roads on two sides. The building features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large window openings, likely maximizing natural light. The property includes a spacious green lawn, a driveway leading to a covered parking area, and a paved walkway connecting the entrance to the street. The exterior walls are light-colored, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The arrangement of trees provides privacy and shade, while the overall site layout suggests a focus on both aesthetics and functionality. The bungalow appears to be a single-story structure with a minimalist, contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard surrounded by mature trees and paved roads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a row of trees lining the street-facing side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive lawn, dense tree line along the property edge, and the rear of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional trees, and the back facade of the bungalow with visible windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lawn, tree border, and the side entrance or secondary access point.
